executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a Flutter Web app (Patient app) built in production mode and served via a static HTTP server on port 8080. The app is in Arabic (RTL). Patient login uses Moroccan phone number (+212) with OTP SMS verification. The app has product categories: herbs, tea, supplements, oils, honey. Focus on testing patient-facing features only. The app uses CanvasKit renderer so the DOM may not have traditional HTML elements - interact with the Flutter canvas.
